name: ask-and-it-is-given
description: Esther and Jerry Hicks's 'Ask and It Is Given: Learning to Manifest Your Desires' — the foundational Law of Attraction guide based on the Teachings of Abraham, presenting 22 practical processes for shifting vibration, aligning with Source energy, and manifesting desires.
useCase: Learn the Law of Attraction through Abraham's teachings, understand your emotional guidance system, and use 22 practical processes to align your vibration and manifest your desires.
knownRisks: Channeled material — some readers may find the metaphysical claims unconvincing
The Law of Attraction is not scientifically validated
Some critics argue the teachings can lead to victim-blaming (attracting negative experiences)
